business_type: Boutique fitness studio offering small group classes and personal training
weekly_tasks_text: Respond to new class inquiries from Instagram, WhatsApp, and website forms; schedule trial classes and personal training sessions; send reminders before classes; track class attendance and no-shows; follow up with trial customers who did not subscribe; create weekly class schedules; post workout tips and class highlights on social media; manage membership renewals and failed payments; answer repeated questions about pricing, class levels, and cancellations; collect feedback from members after workshops or challenges.
current_tools_text: Instagram for inquiries, WhatsApp Business, Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Sheets for tracking, Calendly for trials, Stripe for payments, a simple booking platform for classes.
top_time_sinks_text: Repeating the same pricing and schedule answers; following up manually with trial customers; managing class cancellations and rescheduling; creating social media content every week; tracking failed payments and membership renewals.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Customer health limitations or injury notes; class capacity limits; payment status; membership cancellation terms; personal training schedule changes.
customer_facing_areas_text: Instagram DMs; WhatsApp messages; trial class follow-ups; class reminders; membership renewal messages; social media posts; feedback requests.
primary_goal_text: Convert more trial customers into paying members while reducing manual follow-up and scheduling work.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Fitness or injury-related advice; final decisions about refunds; sensitive member complaints; personal motivation messages to long-term clients.
